purpose: India's services trade (RBI Balance of Payments 'Non-factor Services' invisibles category), converted to US$ using fiscal-year-average exchange rates, combined with the merchandise trade balance to give the fuller goods+services picture.
services_source: MoSPI MCP connector, RBI dataset, indicator 'Invisibles by Category of Transactions', category='Non-factor Services' (sub_indicator_code=14)
dpiit_note: DPIIT does not publish a services-trade dataset -- its main public data product is a goods import-monitoring system (imports.gov.in/imsdpiit) plus FDI statistics, not a trade-balance series.
commerce_ministry_note: DGCI&S (Ministry of Commerce) does track services exports directly via annual 'Service Exports Reporting Form' (SERF) reports (dgciskol.gov.in/Services_Trade.aspx), but these are PDF/Excel releases without a queryable database like TRADESTAT, so RBI's BoP series was used instead for a clean structured time series.
fy_avg_rate_method: 12-month average (Apr-Mar) of this repo's own monthly INR/USD connector series -- an approximation, not RBI's official FY-average rate.

smallest_overall_gap.note: COVID year -- imports crashed further than exports, services held up
